title: ぜ～んぶお任せください♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The first day of training with Super Creek officially begins.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm suuuper excited to see what kind of plan you made for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"A rookie trainer is still a trainer." Her words echo in my mind as I
remind myself of the responsibility I now have.
choice_data_list: All right, let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Great, I'm looking forward to it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We start our training. A few hours later...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... I finished all ten laps.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I designed the training plan based on her performance at tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But looking at how exhausted she is, I think I already pushed her too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry that it took me so long to finish.
choice_data_list:
No, it's my fault for not understanding your
limits...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that since becoming Super Creek's trainer, I may have
gotten ahead of myself. I need to come back down to earth.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're doing well.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. As we get to know each other better, things will smooth
out in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, I'm moved by the fact that this incredibly kind and
talented student partnered up with me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...What are ya guys doin' in the middle of the track, huh?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Why hello there, Tamtam!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, allow me to introduce you to my friend, Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's Tamamo Cross, ya hear?! If you're gonna introduce me, then do it
right, yeah?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I came over here 'cause I heard ya got yourself a trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And I can see ya already gettin' all pampered up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's right—it doesn't matter who ya are, Creek'll do her thing. She
just loves takin' care of the people 'round her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's true—my family runs a day care center.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Since I've spent so much time looking after children, it's become a
habit of mine now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh, so that's why ya like goin' 'round bein' a mom to everyone.
Makes sense now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Hang on a sec. Don't tell me ya see me as one of your lil' kids too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Sometimes I do, but I also think you're mature in your own
way.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes! ...I could say lotsa things 'bout that, but whatever. Creek's
one of my besties, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's why ya better not get too spoiled and slack off now! Make sure
ya watch her carefully!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Aww, you're leaving already? Come back and visit again, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is right. I'm not here to mess around—I'm here to help
Super Creek achieve her best run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I'm going to keep working hard to be a trainer who takes care of
my students—not the other way around!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Good work today, Trainer. I'm looking forward to tomorrow's training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A large stack of instant noodle containers stands in Super Creek's line
of vision.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Are you always eating instant noodles?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hm... You won't get enough vitamins if you don't eat your vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
How about I cook you something for dinner tonight? I'll bring it to you
later. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'll head out now—huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek catches a glimpse of my tracksuit lying in a crumpled
heap.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Do you often leave your clothes out like this?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It'll get all wrinkly if you don't hang it up properly.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll iron it for you this time, so make sure to be careful in the future,
okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Oh my! There are magazines everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I even have a chance to show my dependable side, Super
Creek is already picking up after me.
